pricing.desc: Fixed service fee of $500 USD — no hidden fees, no surprises.

support.desc: Responsive after-sales support team ready to resolve any issues quickly.

process.heading: How We Work — 7 Simple Steps
process.step1desc: Express your interest and schedule a meeting to understand your needs.
process.step2desc: Confirm specifics like brand, model, budget, and timeline.
process.step3desc: Sign the agreement, specify terms, and make the initial payment.
process.step4desc: Our team handles procurement and shares VIN and inspection videos.
process.step5desc: Final payment confirmed, we arrange safe and timely delivery.
process.step6desc: We collect your feedback to continuously improve our service.
process.step7desc: Continuous after-sales assistance for your peace of mind.

about.heading: About Changzhou Houlang New Energy Vehicle Import & Export Co., Ltd.
about.subheading: Your trusted partner for Chinese new energy vehicle export
about.mission_text: To connect global customers with China's finest new energy vehicles through transparent, reliable, and professional export services.
about.vision_text: To become the most trusted bridge between Chinese NEV manufacturers and international markets.
about.team_text: We are a team of automotive industry veterans with deep expertise in vehicle sourcing, quality inspection, international logistics, and after-sales support.

partner.heading: Join Our Global Network
partner.subheading: Become an authorized Changzhou Houlang New Energy Vehicle Import & Export Co., Ltd. partner in your region
partner.benefit1: Access to 30+ Chinese NEV brands at factory-direct pricing
partner.benefit2: Dedicated account manager and priority support
partner.benefit3: Marketing materials and local promotion support

sourcing.title: Vehicle Sourcing
sourcing.desc: Access to 30+ Chinese NEV brands. We find the right vehicles at the best prices.

inspection.title: Quality Inspection
inspection.desc: Rigorous pre-delivery inspection including exterior, interior, mechanical, and electronic checks.

logistics.title: International Logistics
logistics.desc: Door-to-door shipping via RORO, container, or rail. Real-time tracking available.

customs.title: Customs Clearance
customs.desc: Complete export documentation and customs handling for smooth border crossing.

aftersales.title: After-Sales Support
aftersales.desc: Warranty claims, spare parts sourcing, and technical support after delivery.
